final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing macro photography for a phone wallpaper.

Style/medium: needs a macro nature photography aesthetic — references in the spirit of National Geographic macro photography tradition, Japanese 花鳥風月 (kachou-fuugetsu) nature contemplation, 2000s nature documentary cinematography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be extreme close-up macro, centered on the water droplet with circular bokeh background
Subject: must include a water droplet with reflections inside, grass blades and dewdrops surrounding it
Scene/backdrop: must include natural grass environment with circular light bokeh (bokeh balls) in background
Lighting/mood: needs a delicate, magical natural atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, natural green direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a wet, crystalline surface treatment — exact clarity and refraction is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must be suitable for phone wallpaper format
Avoid:
